title: callicarpa brevipes var. obovata
intro: Callicarpa brevipes var. obovata, also known as a type of purple leafed bush or a variety of the Callicarpa brevipes plant, is a flowering plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It is reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Callicarpa brevipes var. obovata can be made by infusing the leaves or stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in a capsule or tincture form.
